mapper.sql: select package_id, package_name, credits_amount, bonus_credits, price_usdt, price_eth, price_bnb, badge, description, icon_url, min_purchase, max_purchase, valid_start, valid_end, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time from virtual_recharge_package
mapper.select: where status = 1 and (valid_start is null or valid_start <= now()) and (valid_end is null or valid_end >= now()) order by sort_order
mapper.insert: insert into virtual_recharge_package (package_name, credits_amount, bonus_credits, price_usdt, price_eth, price_bnb, badge, description, icon_url, min_purchase, max_purchase, valid_start, valid_end, status, sort_order, create_time) values (#{packageName}, #{creditsAmount}, #{bonusCredits}, #{priceUsdt}, #{priceEth}, #{priceBnb}, #{badge}, #{description}, #{iconUrl}, #{minPurchase}, #{maxPurchase}, #{validStart}, #{validEnd}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate())
